elements.original_description: A smiling cartoon character holding a shopping bag, surrounded by floating colorful hearts and sparkles. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a smiling cartoon character holding a shopping bag, surrounded by floating colorful hearts and sparkles. Clean flat vector art on a pure white background, high contrast, no shading or gradients, bright and positive mood, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
